info.description: This is a Gift API server.
info.title: Gift API

get.description: Returns all incomes for the authenticated user

post.description: Creates a new income entry for the authenticated user

get.description: Returns the income by its ObjectID, for the authenticated user

put.description: Updates an existing income by its ObjectID for the authenticated user

delete.description: Deletes an income entry for the authenticated user by its ObjectID

get.description: Returns a single user by their ID

delete.description: Deletes a user by their ID

post.description: Log in with email and password
Log out and revoke all refresh tokens for user
Refresh access and refresh tokens using a refresh token

get.description: Query all groups for the user by name. Returns groups where the user is the owner or a member.
get.summary: List or filter groups for the user

get.description: Get a specific group by its ID

put.description: Update a group's properties by id

post.description: Invite a member to a group (only owner can invite)
Remove a member from a group (only owner can remove)

get.description: Returns a list of spendings filtered by user_id, group_id, category, date range; supports limit/offset
Get a spending by its ID

password.description:
Password for the account (>=8 chars)
required: true

username.description:
Username for the account
required: true

handlers.UpdateUserRequest.description: UpdateUserRequest contains user fields required for the update API.
